title: The Future of Software Development: Why Thinking Matters More Than Coding in the AI Era
excerpt: As AI-assisted tools make writing code cheap, the bottleneck shifts to clear thinking and system design - the actual source of competitive advantage.

title: Why AI Orchestration Matters More Than AI Models: The Next Enterprise AI Competitive Advantage
excerpt: The industry is moving from building individual models to coordinating intelligence across systems. The orchestration and governance layer is where the real advantage lives.

title: You Can Vibe Code an App, But You Can't Vibe Code a SaaS
excerpt: AI tools are great at rapid prototyping. Production SaaS is a different problem - payments, infrastructure, security, and the maintenance that outlasts the demo.

title: From Copilot Studio to Azure AI Foundry: Building a Scalable Multi-Agent AI Architecture
excerpt: Lessons from migrating a multi-agent system off Copilot Studio and onto Azure AI Foundry - and why the orchestration layer, not the model, is what makes it scale.
